overall.description: First-person exploration through a dystopian urban park area in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player moves through a decaying commercial district with overgrown vegetation, trash accumulation, and makeshift camps, passing various NPCs and approaching a large illuminated dome structure.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a concrete plaza with a yellow commercial building and digital billboard visible. The camera ascends stairs past two characters—one standing with crossed arms and another sitting—while approaching a terrace area with a fire pit and accumulated trash.

segments.scene_description: Moving along a concrete terrace, the camera passes a burning fire pit surrounded by piled trash bags and a camping tent. The environment transitions from urban concrete to a more overgrown area with vegetation as the path continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown urban trail with palm trees and benches

passing multiple NPCs seated on concrete benches along the path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow dirt footpath surrounded by dense vegetation and palm trees. The camera follows a character in a white tank top while passing other NPCs seated on concrete benches. Digital billboards are visible in the distance above the overgrown terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to large dome structure with dumpsters and gates

passing green dumpsters and scattered trash near the dome entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching a large dome structure, passing dumpsters and a metal gate

character in black jacket standing near the dumpsters

entered.detail: massive geodesic dome structure with purple illuminated panels
large green metal dumpsters overflowing with trash bags
metal barrier gate blocking the path ahead
wooden plank fence along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a massive purple-lit dome structure on the right. The camera passes green dumpsters and scattered trash while navigating toward a metal gate. Other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the path leads to the dome entrance area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a decaying commercial plaza that gradually transforms into an overgrown urban wilderness leading toward a massive illuminated structure. It begins by ascending concrete stairs past two idling characters, moving toward a terrace area marked by a burning fire pit and piles of trash. As the camera pushes forward, the urban concrete gives way to a narrow dirt footpath where dense vegetation and palm trees begin to reclaim the landscape. The scene then shifts to follow a character in a white tank top past NPCs on concrete benches, with digital billboards looming over the greenery in the distance. Finally, the path opens up as the camera passes green dumpsters and oncoming pedestrians, navigating toward a metal gate and the glowing purple light of a massive dome.
